George and John

Kid Food Critic: Georgie’s Hilarious Lasagna Taste Test! 🍝🔥 (Did It Make the Cut?)

Welcome to another episode of The Georgie and Johnny Show! In today’s video, our favorite kid food critic, Georgie, is taking on a classic dish—lasagna! 🍝 Watch as Georgie dives into a plate of this cheesy, saucy goodness and gives his honest, hilarious, and unfiltered review. Will it be a hit or a miss? You’ll have to watch to find out! 😋 Don’t forget to hit that like button, subscribe, and ring the bell so you never miss a tasty adventure with Georgie and Johnny!

Watch on YouTube

About this video

Welcome to another episode of The Georgie and Johnny Show! In today’s video, our favorite kid food critic, Georgie, is taking on a classic dish—lasagna! 🍝 Watch as Georgie dives into a plate of this cheesy, saucy goodness and gives his honest, hilarious, and unfiltered review. Will it be a hit or a miss? You’ll have to watch to find out! 😋 Don’t forget to hit that like button, subscribe, and ring the bell so you never miss a tasty adventure with Georgie and Johnny!
